author: Luka CF
name: Record: 11L Multi-Order N-gram Backoff + Entropy-Adaptive Alpha + Soft-Round QAT + Full GPTQ
blurb: Novel eval-time n-gram cache with multi-order backoff (2,3,4,5-gram) and entropy-adaptive mixing weight. Score-first legal: cache updated only after scoring. Proper distribution: p_mixed = (1-a)*p_model + a*p_ng sums to 1. Training: Soft-Round QAT + Full Hessian GPTQ + VRL + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + BigramHash(8192,192) + XSA-all(11) + EMA(0.997). 11L, 512d, int6+zstd-22.
